title_en: Genie 2 makes world models more interactive
title_zh: Genie 2 让世界模型更接近可交互系统
description_en: Genie 2 moves world models from research artifact toward practical interactive environment generation.
description_zh: Genie 2 让世界模型从研究原型更接近实用的交互环境生成系统。
why_it_matters: A major step toward world models as interfaces, not just predictors.
